data.title: create-dso-app.sh: installs dependencies and exits -> does not configure template project with onboarding defaults
data.description:
## Incident Overview
create-dso-app.sh installs dependencies (Node, Python, etc.) and then exits without configuring the template project. It should set up sensible default onboarding files (CLAUDE.md, .claude/dso-config.conf, etc.) so the project is immediately usable.

## Expected vs Observed
- **Expected**: After installing dependencies, create-dso-app.sh configures the template project with sensible defaults: writes base CLAUDE.md, initializes .claude/dso-config.conf with common settings, runs initial git commit, and leaves the project in a ready-to-run state.
- **Observed**: create-dso-app.sh installs prerequisites and exits, leaving the template project unconfigured. The user must then manually run /dso:onboarding to configure the project.

## Affected Component
plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh — post-install configuration phase

## Notes
Reported by user during interactive session. The script should complete the full project scaffolding, not just dependency installation.
